creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Though the full license text isn't included, several files (cpdup.1, cpdup.c, fsmid.c, and md5.c) all contain disclaimers such as "Permission to use and distribute based on the (DragonFly|FreeBSD) copyright.  Supplied as-is".  I think Matt Dillon's intent is clear enough to define LICENSE=BSD in the port.
